Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 139 

LINE_NUM 

LABEL: Sequential Claim Line Number 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies an individual line number on a claim. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_NUM 

LONG NAME: LINE_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: 1–XXX 

COMMENT: Each claim line has a sequential line number to distinguish distinct services that
